name: turnoverAnalysis
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/hr.js). 3-arg dispatch via /api/lens/run on key 'hr.turnoverAnalysis'. HrActionPanel sends FLAT { headcount, leaversLast12Months } and renders r.result.{ratePct,benchmarkPct,topReason,band}. Deterministic pure compute: ratePct = leavers / avg-headcount (head + leavers/2 BLS convention); benchmarkPct=13; band classifies vs benchmark; topReason is band-derived. Was DEAD both directions before the 2026-06-28 fix (handler read totalEmployees/departuresThisYear and returned turnoverRate/riskLevel). POISON: 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'12abc' coerce via Number()+isFinite (NOT parseFloat) so headcount stays a real N or the call rejects; ratePct never NaN/Infinity. Not driven by macro-assassin; pinned by server/tests/hr-lens-macros.test.js.
